title: update_contact_fully leaks internal message via Err for programmer precondition
description: update_contact_fully returns Err(anyhow::anyhow!("both blocked and display_name are None; ...")) when the caller passes both args as None. The jmap.rs call site maps this to server_fail(&e.to_string()), which logs the message and returns a JMAP serverFail response to the client. This is a programmer precondition violation (the call site already guards against this with an if check), not a runtime DB error. Returning Err() for it: (1) leaks an internal debug message to JMAP clients, (2) conflates programmer errors with real DB failures in the error channel. Fix: use unreachable!() or debug_assert!() + unreachable!() — the precondition can only fire due to a programming mistake, not a runtime condition.
close_reason: Fixed in store.rs: panic for precondition, exhaustive-match test, SELECT 1 for existence check; decision records filed
